From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Legislative Assembly constituency in Punjab State, India

| Jalandhar Cantt. | |
| --- | --- |
| Constituency No. 37 for the [Punjab Legislative Assembly](/wiki/Punjab_Legislative_Assembly "Punjab Legislative Assembly") | |
|  | |
| Constituency details | |
| Country | [India](/wiki/India "India") |
| [State](/wiki/States_and_union_territories_of_India "States and union territories of India") | [Punjab](/wiki/Punjab,_India "Punjab, India") |
| [District](/wiki/List_of_districts_in_India "List of districts in India") | [Jalandhar](/wiki/Jalandhar_district "Jalandhar district") |
| [Lok Sabha constituency](/wiki/List_of_constituencies_of_the_Lok_Sabha "List of constituencies of the Lok Sabha") | [Jalandhar](/wiki/Jalandhar_(Lok_Sabha_constituency) "Jalandhar (Lok Sabha constituency)") |
| Total electors | 193,666 (in 2022) |
| Reservation | None |
| [Member of Legislative Assembly](/wiki/Member_of_the_Legislative_Assembly_(India) "Member of the Legislative Assembly (India)") | |
| [16th Punjab Legislative Assembly](/wiki/16th_Punjab_Assembly "16th Punjab Assembly") | |
| **Incumbent** **[Pargat Singh](/wiki/Pargat_Singh "Pargat Singh")** | |

| Elected year | [2022](/wiki/2022_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2022 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") |

**Jalandhar Cantt Assembly constituency** (Sl. No.: 37) is a [Punjab Legislative Assembly](/wiki/Punjab_Legislative_Assembly "Punjab Legislative Assembly") constituency in
[Jalandhar district](/wiki/Jalandhar_district "Jalandhar district"), [Punjab](/wiki/Punjab,_India "Punjab, India") state, India.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Members of the Legislative Assembly

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jalandhar_Cantonment_Assembly_constituency&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Members of the Legislative Assembly")]

| Year | Member | Party | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [1997](/wiki/1997_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "1997 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") | [Tej Parkash Singh](/wiki/Tej_Parkash_Singh "Tej Parkash Singh") |  | [Indian National Congress](/wiki/Indian_National_Congress "Indian National Congress") |
| [2002](/wiki/2002_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2002 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") | [Gurkanwal Kaur](/wiki/Gurkanwal_Kaur "Gurkanwal Kaur") |
| [2007](/wiki/2007_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2007 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") | [Jagbir Singh Brar](/wiki/Jagbir_Singh_Brar "Jagbir Singh Brar") |  | [Shiromani Akali Dal](/wiki/Shiromani_Akali_Dal "Shiromani Akali Dal") |
| [2012](/wiki/2012_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2012 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") | [Pargat Singh](/wiki/Pargat_Singh "Pargat Singh") |
| [2017](/wiki/2017_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2017 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") |  | [Indian National Congress](/wiki/Indian_National_Congress "Indian National Congress") |
| [2022](/wiki/2022_Punjab_Legislative_Assembly_election "2022 Punjab Legislative Assembly election") |
